activity_bracket.interpretation: This is a batch- and optimizer-dependent activity bracket, not a theoretical lambda_zero estimate.
activity_bracket.method: coarse optimizer-dependent activity threshold under cap-free Adam

blockers: damage did not move closer to the target over the adaptive sequence
damage did not move closer to the target over the adaptive sequence

batch.construction: repeat_single_validation_trial(pair.task.validation_trials, batch_size), the fixed +x 15 cm nominal validation reach used by the prior local replays
batch.replicate_handling: single frozen replicate selected from the five-replicate ensemble for CPU cost

cap_free_contract.epsilon_scale_role: recorded output only, not a guard criterion

contract.adversary_application: Matched optimal fixed policy F_t from robust_estimator_fixed_adversary_policy; applied each step as epsilon_t = F_t @ concat([x_t, xhat_t]) through plant.Bw. The clean condition uses the same controller/estimator with epsilon_t=0.
contract.cost_contract: C&S Eq. 15 no-integrator 6D schedule: Q shape (60, 36, 36), R shape (60, 2, 2), Qf shape (36, 36).
contract.state_basis: 36D delay-augmented state = 6 delayed physical blocks of [x, y, vx, vy, force_x, force_y]; no disturbance-integrator coordinates; observation is the oldest delayed 6D physical block.
contract.target_convention: goal-centered C&S state with INIT_POS=[0,0], TARGET_POS=[0.15,0]; x0 repeats [-0.15, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0] across all six delay blocks.

lambda_source.source_objective_energy_convention: E_i = sum_t,d delta_epsilon_i,t,d^2 over active mask
